name: stage2-rvv-low-precision-contraction-surface
title: Stage2 RVV low-precision contraction primitive-surface campaign
description: Macro campaign for Stage2 RVV low-precision contraction primitive-surface maturity. Current slice completed a Gate 3 route provider / artifact-export carry-through boundary cleanup for signed i8 and unsigned u8 product-reduction representatives.
creator: codex
notes: Gate 1 foundation slice completed. Gate 2 signed representative slice completed earlier: added tcrv_rvv.typed_widening_product_reduce_pre_realized_body, verifier coverage for signed i8/i16/i32 primitive typed/runtime facts, provider-side pre-realized validator, and RVV contraction selected-body realization that materializes setvl/with_vl/load/widening_product/standalone_reduce/store before route construction. Gate 2 signedness boundary cleanup completed: the same pre-realized body now carries source_signedness, verifier/provider validation accepts only signedness-consistent signed i8/i16/i32 or unsigned u8/u16/u32 product-reduction contracts, realization derives unsigned ui8/ui16/ui32 vector types plus unsigned_widening_product/unsigned_widening_reduce_add and unsigned provider primitive facts, and focused signed/unsigned pre-realized lit coverage proves realization plus emission-plan/header carry-through. Current Gate 3 carry-through slice completed: signed and unsigned product-reduction route descriptions now carry a provider-owned low-precision primitive route payload, emission metadata serializes tcrv_rvv.low_precision_primitive.* only from that payload, and target artifact validation compares candidate primitive mirrors against the provider payload before artifact acceptance. Focused explicit/pre-realized signed and unsigned artifact lit coverage includes missing runtime-control and product-SEW mirror rejection. Macro task remains open for any remaining Gate 3 expansion beyond this plain product-reduction carry-through slice and Gate 4 fresh source-backed same-target evidence/admission if later claimed.
